failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the catalog evidence needed to determine whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and plan: use ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id, then answer from returned evidence. The invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the correct arguments. The tool explicitly returned an infrastructure/connectivity-style error: a dependency timeout after 30000ms. No later step resolved this because the executor only reported that the task could not be completed and no retry or alternate evidence appeared.
